---
title: "Transformers"
comments: false
toc: false
---

<p class="project-page-intro">
Transformer projects covering from-scratch implementations, PyTorch models,
attention mechanics, architecture variants, and efficiency-focused experiments.
</p>

<div class="project-stack">
  <!-- Add Transformer in NumPy GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">Transformer in NumPy</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">Tokenization, embeddings, attention, MLP blocks, layer norm, and training loop basics</span>
  </a>

  <!-- Add Transformer in PyTorch GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">Transformer in PyTorch</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">Clean encoder/decoder implementation with modular attention and training utilities</span>
  </a>

  <!-- Add Attention Variants GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">Attention Variants</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">MHA, MQA, GQA, sliding-window attention, rotary embeddings, and KV-cache-aware decoding</span>
  </a>

  <!-- Add Efficient Architectures GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">Efficient Architectures</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">Long-context, sparse, linear-attention, and memory-efficient transformer experiments</span>
  </a>
</div>
